content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback pipeline for general output refinement by integrating the multiple inconsistent perspective design from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that surfaces hidden flaws missed by single-perspective self-feedback. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data, while fixing its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from aligned self-feedback.
